response.original_title: Born Again: The Power Team Story
response.overview: The rise, fall, and rebirth of The Power Team, a group of bodybuilding preachers whose feats of strength once drew crowds of 50,000 to stadiums across the globe. Will they ever find that level of success again? Do they want to? The film investigates the physical, psychological, familial and spiritual challenges these massive bodybuilders must endure to bring the unsaved to Christ.
response.title: Born Again: The Power Team Story
